input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.7.2.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.7.2.1
            TITLE: the shutdown circuit must open when any of the following exist:

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.7.2.1: The Shutdown Circuit must Open when any of the following exist:
EV.7.2.1 The Shutdown Circuit must Open when any of the following exist:   
a. Operation of, or detection from any of the components listed in EV.7.1.1 
b. Any shutdown of the GLV System

final_answer: rule EV.7.2.1: The Shutdown Circuit must Open when any of the following exist: EV.7.2.1 The Shutdown Circuit must Open when any of the following exist: a. Operation of, or detection from any of the components listed in EV.7.1.1 b. Any shutdown of the GLV System
